summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PROOF™ athlete management platform. All backend APIs (40/40 tests passed), public site navigation (15/15 routes), authentication flows, admin CMS features, member portal, brand deck, and RBAC enforcement tested successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: All 40 API tests passed (100% success rate)

Public site: All 13 routes load without errors (/,/services,/sports-management,/sports-advisory,/strategic-advisory,/athletes,/athletes/devon-marsh,/approach,/about,/press,/press/silence-strategy,/contact,/legal)
Responsive design: No horizontal scroll at 1440px and 375px viewports
Contact form: Successfully submits inquiry (POST /api/ops/inquiries 200)
Login flow: Owner redirects to /admin, Member redirects to /portal
Admin Dashboard: Shows correct KPIs (6 athletes, 10 users, 4 staff, 6 documents)
CMS Pages: Lists >= 3 seeded pages, page editor opens and saves successfully
CMS Posts: Lists 3 posts
Block Editor: Can add blocks (Heading tested), save, and view revisions
Media Library: Loads successfully
Menus: Shows all 4 menu locations (header, footer_firm, footer_practices, footer_legal)
Roster: Lists all 6 athletes (Devon Marsh, Amara Knight, Niko Pereira, Reese Donovan, Cassian Vega, Hollis Bryant)
Accounts: Shows staff and member users
Invites: Page loads, create invite button present
Audit Log: Lists entries with actions (login, create, etc.)
Analytics: Shows rolling 7d KPI grid
Settings: Loads and save returns 200
Member Portal Today: Shows next event, document count (3), unread messages (1)
Member Portal Documents: Lists 3 documents, download button generates signed URL
Member Portal Calendar: Shows 2 events, .ics export option available
Member Portal Messages: Shows 1 message thread with 'Welcome' message
Member Portal News: Shows 2 announcements
Member Portal Account: Shows user profile (Devon)
RBAC: Member correctly redirected from /admin to /portal
Brand Deck: Shows access gate without token, loads with token (slide 01/27)
Brand Deck Navigation: ArrowRight advances to slide 02
Sitemap.xml: Returns valid XML with static paths and seeded pages/posts
Robots.txt: Valid format, blocks /admin /portal /deck, includes sitemap reference
